title: Support - Device - No Devices Connected screen
scenario: Support > Device screen shows "No Devices Connected" message when no previously connected devices are found
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the mobile device.
2. Ensure no Poly Bluetooth audio devices have been previously connected to the mobile device.
4. Tap on the Support option (or navigate to Support from the menu).
5. Tap on the Device screen within Support.
expected: The app displays a "No Devices Connected" screen with the text: "No previously connected devices were found. Please connect devices using the mobile device's Bluetooth Settings prior to requesting device support."
